mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index signals expanding economic output and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly higher than baseline during rising INDPRO periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, it indicates labor market deterioration and recession risk, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or threshold crossing fails to predict direction with p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising consumer prices and persistently low federal funds rates creates positive real yield compression and liquidity expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields negative forward returns in > 55% of cases, or interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a housing recovery regime where housing starts exceed 1 million units, synchronized growth in housing starts and real sales of new houses signals robust consumer demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in > 60% of triggered instances, or the housing demand signal fails to outperform market baseline over 60-day horizons.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect immediate economic momentum and consumer spending capacity, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive payroll changes do not correlate with positive 5-day forward returns (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index surpasses 235.0, it signals accelerating inflation that forces monetary tightening expectations, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or inflation threshold fails to predict direction with p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between slowing real GDP growth and rising unemployment indicates a deteriorating macroeconomic backdrop, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields positive forward returns in > 55% of cases, or interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion regime where industrial production falls below 105.0, supply-side constraints and weakening manufacturing activity trigger negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 60% of triggered instances, or the supply constraint signal fails to predict short-term direction with p < 0.05.
